title: grammitis australis var. nana
intro: Grammitis australis var. nana, also known as the dwarf fern, is a small, terrestrial fern species native to New Zealand. The plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Grammitis australis var. nana include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce inflammation, and support immune function. It can be prepared as an herbal tea, salve, or infusion, making it a versatile remedy for various health concerns.
